data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Partial value tracking across multiple bookings', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case explicitly states the need for partial value tracking, yet there is no evidence of how the system handles the remaining balance after a booking is made. This indicates a clear gap in the implementation of the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of partial value tracking across multiple bookings.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for partial value tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the partial value tracking functionality.
